'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/UKThreatLevel/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=JBp8watsJKE3ul8KR3S3X16oGgq5_uCCOSQleg0fk_k-1773954292-1.0.1.1-YSfk4Md1cvv6GtI8tyvWCDGjh0ydt9e_HkiNCvJfsy8"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
